◎简　　介  

　　探索发现频道的军事节目，考验选手的各项军事素质，赢家可获一万美元奖励。Hawke also hosted the Discovery Channel show,[6] One Man Army, in which personnel from backgrounds such as special operations, military, law enforcement, and extreme sports, competed in three areas of speed, strength, and intelligence to win prize money.
